{"step_by_step_thinking": "Bicuspidization refers to the development of a bicuspid tooth from a molar tooth. This process involves the fusion of the mesial and distal roots of a molar tooth to form a single root, resulting in a bicuspid tooth. None of the given options accurately describe this process.
